# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report suspected vulnerabilities in public issues.

Use GitHub Security Advisories to privately report security concerns for Prismgo Lens:

https://github.com/prismgo/lens/security/advisories/new

Include the affected version or commit, reproduction steps, relevant configuration, and any logs that help maintainers confirm the issue.

## Scope

Security reports may involve the Prismgo Lens CLI, MCP server behavior, generated agent configuration, host project inspection, documentation search, browser log handling, or local configuration files such as `.prismgo-lens.json`.
